title: Vanilla But Wrong
description: Vanilla but wrong is a Fabric psychological horror mod for singleplayer and multiplayer. One shared sanity system, adaptive Director events, trauma progression, and UI/audio corruption turn normal survival into a tense mind game.
body:
# Vanilla But Wrong

A Fabric psychological horror mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 centered on **shared sanity**, **adaptive events**, **trauma progression**, and **UI/audio corruption**.

## Overview

But Vanilla is Wrong introduces a global sanity model for multiplayer and singleplayer sessions.
The game tracks pressure, escalates intrusions, and turns ordinary survival decisions into high-stakes risk management.

## Key Features

- Global shared sanity system (hivemind model)
- Context-driven Director events with escalation phases
- Event priority/lock orchestration for coherent pacing
- Low-sanity visual/audio/UI corruption
- Trauma stack system tied to death progression
- Medicine-based recovery layer
- First-join written manual with mechanic + recipe guidance

## Sanity Model

- One sanity pool for everyone on the server
- Passive and impact loss channels
- Environmental pressure scaling:
- hunger stress
- darkness stress
- weather/biome stress
- dimension pressure modifiers
- Controlled low-band pacing near critical values

## Event Framework

- Director attacks selected by sanity phase and context
- Priority-aware event locking to prevent noisy overlaps
- Critical-phase event sets for endgame pressure
- Execution states block lower interruptions

## Trauma and Recovery

- Death increases trauma burden
- Trauma reduces long-term ceiling/stability
- Dedicated medicine items for recovery workflows
- Death/respawn handling integrated with cap-aware sanity flow

## UX and Horror Presentation

- Dynamic sanity HUD and phase readability
- Corrupted overlays on menus and in-game screens at low sanity
- Button instability effects for psychological tension
- Tooltip/name corruption and ambient discomfort cues
- Retuned passive encounter audio for cleaner, less fatiguing horror

## Multiplayer Notes

- Built for co-op pressure and consequence sharing
- Join/respawn grace handling for fairness
- Session/world state handling tuned to avoid unintended carryover behavior
- New arrivals are integrated into active world pressure state

## Compatibility

- Minecraft: 1.21.1
- Mod Loader: Fabric
- Java: 21
- Environment: Client + Server
- Play modes: Singleplayer + Multiplayer

## Version Direction

The current overhaul generation focuses on:
- better pacing
- cleaner event logic
- stronger atmosphere
- fewer unfair edge cases
- better onboarding and readability
